name: Juro
description: Juro contract management and automation platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Juro
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → API
3. Create an API key
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Juro → Settings → Integrations → API → Create API key
